title: ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Flask Funnel Camping Gear (1-1/2 Inch Diameter)
description:
Simplify pouring and storage tasks like never before with the ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Funnel. Designed for precision and convenience, this funnel is the perfect tool for transferring liquids into flasks, jars, bottles, or other small containers without the mess. Measuring 2 inches in height with a 1-1/2 inch mouth diameter, and a 3/8 inch spout, it fits perfectly with flasks that have a 3/8 inch spout opening. Crafted from premium 304 stainless steel, this funnel is built for durability and long lasting use. Its 0.55mm thickness ensures strength while remaining lightweight and easy to handle, making it a reliable and handy addition to outdoor gear.

ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Flask Funnel Camping Gear (1-1/2 Inch Diameter)

Simplify pouring and storage tasks like never before with the ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Funnel. Designed for precision and convenience, this funnel is the perfect tool for transferring liquids into flasks, jars, bottles, or other small containers without the mess.

Measuring 2 inches in height with a 1-1/2 inch mouth diameter, and a 3/8 inch spout, it fits perfectly with flasks that have a 3/8 inch spout opening. Crafted from premium 304 stainless steel, this funnel is built for durability and long lasting use. Its 0.55mm thickness ensures strength while remaining lightweight and easy to handle, making it a reliable and handy addition to outdoor gear.

Key Features

  • PERFECT SIZE FOR FLASKS - 2 inches tall with a 1-1/2 inch mouth diameter and 3/8 inch spout, ideal for flask openings
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - 304 stainless steel rust resistant construction for longevity
  • PRECISION POURING - Prevents spills and mess when transferring liquids
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND STRONG - 0.55mm thickness for reliable daily use
  • REFILL ON THE GO - Ideal for refilling your favorite beverages while out adventuring, camping, hiking, backpacking and more

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO-YFS7O9MJ
  • UPC: 810131704094
  • Color: Silver
